summary: Swapped chair (oz+0.3) and shelves (oz+1.5) so shelves render behind the couch from FP-spawn POV. Chair flipped to face +z (back rest, back cushion, frame above chair, all child positions updated). Added invisible 0.7×0.2×0.6 seat-cushion interactable that opens 读《许三观卖血记》(余华) modal via the existing focus + E flow. New XU_SAN_GUAN_INTERACTABLE registered alongside the blog dialogue in src/data/bookRoom.ts. Build + lint clean. Playwright verifies modalInteractable.title contains 许三观卖血记 and body length is 99 (≥60).
